name: Orchestrator Few-Shot Examples
summary: Complete delegation cycle examples for orchestrator agents

steps: Step 1 - Delegate to specialist: delegate(to_agent='plotwright', task='Create section brief for opening scene', context={'artifact_refs': [], 'notes': 'Mystery genre, noir tone'}, expected_outputs=[{'artifact_type': 'section_brief'}])
Step 2 - Agent returns with artifact IDs: {"summary": "Created section brief", "result_assessment": "pass", "recommendation": "proceed", "artifacts_produced": ["SB-001"]}

Step 3 - Continue chain with artifact ID: delegate(to_agent='scene_smith', task='Write prose for section brief SB-001', context={'artifact_refs': ['SB-001']}, expected_outputs=[{'artifact_type': 'section'}])

Step 5 - Send to validation: delegate(to_agent='gatekeeper', task='Validate section-001 against quality bars', context={'artifact_refs': ['section-001']}, expected_outputs=[{'artifact_type': 'gatecheck_report'}])
preconditions: User goal is clear and specific
postconditions: Each delegation includes artifact IDs from previous agent

heuristics.guidance: Always pass artifact IDs from previous agent to next agent in context.artifact_refs
examples: Plotwright returns SB-001 -> pass 'SB-001' to Scene Smith
Scene Smith returns section-001 -> pass 'section-001' to Gatekeeper

heuristics.guidance: Check result_assessment and recommendation to decide next action
examples: result_assessment='pass' + recommendation='proceed' -> delegate to next agent
result_assessment='partial' + recommendation='rework' -> delegate back to same agent with fixes

warnings.consequence: Next agent cannot find previous work, workflow breaks
warnings.prevention: Always include artifacts_produced IDs in next delegation's context.artifact_refs
